must_detect.matched_text:
Project Palm Reef — Heads of Terms for a proposed acquisition of 51% of Siraj Ports PJSC (issuer; ADX‑listed, ticker “SPX”) by Thamra Blue Capital (DIFC) Ltd via Al Mirqab SPV Ltd (ADGM)
Status: Contains inside information under SCA Market Conduct Regulations and ADX Disclosure & Transparency Standards; selective disclosure prohibited; an SCA‑compliant insider list will be maintained by the Issuer
Consideration: AED 1,240,000,000 cash on completion plus AED 160,000,000 earn‑out over 24 months, subject to throughput KPIs; materiality assessed relative to Issuer consolidated revenue (>5%) per Issuer policy
Funding: Committed bridge from Rimal First Bank (DIFC Branch) and equity from Thamra Blue GP Fund I; no public securities offering contemplated under this term sheet
Conditions precedent: SCA/ADX approvals of Major Transaction circular, Issuer shareholder approval, Emirate Ports Authority consent, confirmatory diligence; no MAC, and routine published maintenance outages shall not constitute a Material Adverse Change
Disclosure: To be announced without delay via the ADX platform upon signing and in any case before the next trading session; if atypical price/volume occurs, the Issuer may request a trading suspension per ADX procedures
Blackout: Parties acknowledge the Issuer’s pre‑close blackout window from quarter‑end to results announcement; deal communications limited to need‑to‑know and coordinated through the Disclosure Committee
Public reference: See the Issuer’s already‑announced press release dated 02‑May‑2025 on the ADX portal regarding Q1 throughput; that disclosure is public, stale, and not indicative of this transaction’s terms (http://ad x.ae/disclosure?id=SPX-PR-02052025)
Process: Market sounding, if any, will follow SCA guidance with recorded consents; all recipients to be wall‑crossed and added to the insider list; no use of social media or selective briefings
Execution: Target signing 28‑Jul‑2026; long‑stop 30‑Nov‑2026; announcement sequence: internal notice, ADX release, SCA filing, then press Q&A; no forward‑looking statements beyond approved script
Parties/IDs (KYC only): Mr. Omar Al‑Habshi (Authorised Signatory, Thamra Blue Capital (DIFC) Ltd), Emirates ID (masked) 784‑XX‑5 9 3X‑123456‑X; Trade Licence: CL‑DF‑7R2‑90876; family‑origin data collected solely for KYC and not used in decisioning
Contacts: Ms. Layla Al Samari, Deal Coordinator — e m a i l: l.samari@thamrablue.ae — tel: +971 5 0 0 0 1 2 3 4; data room link: https://vdr.thamrablue.ae/p/ProjectPalmReef?token=abC12 x y
Miscellaneous: Confidentiality aligned with DIFC/ADGM confidentiality frameworks; governing law: ADGM; exclusivity 45 days; break fee AED 24,000,000; no change to employee canteen hours or office Wi‑Fi maintenance, which are not price‑sensitive
Negative/non‑MNPI content: public sources include the Issuer’s 2024 annual report and broad media coverage; todo: update gantt, refresh RoadRunner v3.4 relea
